description: Opt-in cascading right-click menu that lists every script in registry.json, grouped by category, version embedded in the title.

messages.scriptDisabled: Script Fixer context menu is disabled in config (set 'enabled': true to install).
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.versionMissing: scripts/version.json not found at {path} -- using 'unknown' in title.
messages.detectingShell: Detecting PowerShell executable to launch scripts...
messages.shellNotFound: Could not resolve a PowerShell executable. Searched: {paths}
messages.scopeDisabled: Scope '{scope}' disabled in config -- skipping (and cleaning up if previously installed).
messages.wipeNothingToDo: No previous tree at {topKey} -- nothing to wipe.
messages.uninstalling: Uninstalling Script Fixer context menu from all scopes...
messages.summaryInstalled: Installed '{label}' across {scopeCount} scope(s), {catCount} categor(ies), {leafCount} script entr(ies).
messages.summaryFailed: Install completed WITH ERRORS -- check log above.
messages.tipRefresh: Tip: after editing registry.json or bumping version, run: .\run.ps1 refresh

commands.install: Install (or refresh) the cascading right-click menu in every enabled scope
commands.uninstall: Remove the cascading menu from every scope
commands.refresh: Uninstall + re-install -- use after editing registry.json or bumping version
